changelog:
Replace full-response buffering for Claude streams with guarded live streaming. Tool and Claude Code streams may still retry accounts and endpoints before the first actionable text or complete tool call; once committed, buffered events are flushed immediately and subsequent chunks stream live. This preserves malformed-tool protection while substantially reducing time to first visible output.
Claude 流式响应不再等待整段生成完成后一次性返回。工具流和 Claude Code 流在首个有效正文或完整工具调用前仍可重试账号与端点；确认有效后立即释放已缓存事件并实时转发后续分块，在保留残缺工具调用保护的同时显著降低首字时间。
